parents.subject: LU-12410 lnet: Convert yaml peer configuration

commit.subject: LU-12611 lnet: continue adding routes
commit.message:
LU-12611 lnet: continue adding routes

Continue adding routes specified even if the current route
exists or the gateway specified in the current route is unreachable.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/35641
Lustre-commit: 4e0246c6dc15b5035a4bd875902eedaf42f63cdd

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I71257cd444c29d4641d9d27f05d9160871316b02
